declarations.description: Form-associated 24-hour time input web component with jb-input editing, jb-time-picker popover, keyboard stepping, Persian digit display, and jb-validation support.
declarations.name: JBTimeInputWebComponent

attributes.name: value
attributes.description: Canonical time value. Use HH:mm:ss when seconds are enabled and HH:mm when second-enabled is false.

attributes.name: label
attributes.description: Label forwarded to the inner jb-input and host aria label.

attributes.name: message
attributes.description: Helper message forwarded to the inner jb-input and host aria description.

attributes.name: name
attributes.description: Form field name forwarded to the inner jb-input.

attributes.name: placeholder
attributes.description: Placeholder forwarded to the inner jb-input.

attributes.name: close-button-text
attributes.description: Text shown inside the time picker popover close button.

attributes.name: second-enabled
attributes.description: Enables the second unit. Empty attribute and true mean enabled; false disables seconds.

attributes.name: frontal-zero
attributes.description: Displays picker values below 10 with a leading zero.

attributes.name: optional-units
attributes.description: Comma or space separated list of picker units displayed as optional: hour, minute, second.

attributes.name: show-persian-number
attributes.description: Displays Persian digits while keeping value in English digits.

attributes.name: required
attributes.description: Enables required validation. A string value is used as the validation message.

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: Disables the inner input and sets disabled state on the host.

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: Visual size forwarded to the inner jb-input.

members.name: value
members.description: Canonical time value submitted with forms.

members.name: second
members.description: Second value from 0 to 59, or null when seconds are disabled.

members.name: secondEnabled
members.description: Enables or disables the second unit.

members.name: frontalZero
members.description: Displays picker values below 10 with a leading zero.

members.name: showPersianNumber
members.description: Displays Persian digits in the input and picker.

members.name: disabled
members.description: Enables or disables the inner input.

members.name: validation
members.description: jb-validation helper. Set validation.list for custom validation rules.

methods.name: checkValidity
methods.description: Runs validation without showing the error message and returns whether the input is valid.

methods.name: reportValidity
methods.description: Runs validation, shows the first error message, and returns whether the input is valid.

methods.name: addHour
methods.description: Adds an interval to the hour value. Use a negative number to subtract.

methods.name: addMinute
methods.description: Adds an interval to the minute value. Use a negative number to subtract.

methods.name: addSecond
methods.description: Adds an interval to the second value. Use a negative number to subtract.

events.name: input
events.description: Dispatched after user input changes the time value.

events.name: beforeinput
events.description: Re-dispatched from the inner input before user input is applied.

events.name: change
events.description: Dispatched when the committed time value changes.

events.name: focus
events.description: Re-dispatched when the inner input receives focus.

events.name: blur
events.description: Re-dispatched when the inner input loses focus.

cssParts.name: wrapper
cssParts.description: Root wrapper inside the shadow DOM.

cssParts.name: label
cssParts.description: Forwarded label part from the internal jb-input.

cssParts.name: input-box
cssParts.description: Forwarded input-box part from the internal jb-input.

cssParts.name: message
cssParts.description: Forwarded message part from the internal jb-input.

cssParts.name: popover-content
cssParts.description: Forwarded content part from the internal jb-popover.

cssParts.name: picker-wrapper
cssParts.description: Forwarded wrapper part from the internal jb-time-picker.

cssParts.name: clock
cssParts.description: Forwarded clock part from the internal jb-time-picker.

cssParts.name: outer-circle
cssParts.description: Forwarded outer-circle part from the internal jb-time-picker.

cssParts.name: inner-circle
cssParts.description: Forwarded inner-circle part from the internal jb-time-picker.

cssParts.name: picker-time-indicators
cssParts.description: Forwarded time-indicators part from the internal jb-time-picker.

cssParts.name: picker-time-text
cssParts.description: Forwarded time-text part from the internal jb-time-picker.

cssParts.name: picker-hour-text
cssParts.description: Forwarded hour-text part from the internal jb-time-picker.

cssParts.name: picker-minute-text
cssParts.description: Forwarded minute-text part from the internal jb-time-picker.

cssParts.name: picker-second-text
cssParts.description: Forwarded second-text part from the internal jb-time-picker.

cssProperties.name: --jb-time-input-popover-z-index
cssProperties.description: Z-index used by the internal time picker popover.

cssProperties.name: --jb-time-input-close-button-bg-color-hover
cssProperties.description: Popover close button hover background color.

cssStates.name: invalid
cssStates.description: Applied while validation error text is visible.

cssStates.name: open
cssStates.description: Applied while the time picker popover is open.
